name: Ironvein Seam
description: A rust-streaked vein of ore runs through an exposed rock face, glittering where the light catches it. Good pickings for anyone carrying a pick.

discovery.message: The rock face ahead is streaked with ore — a workable seam.

seam.text: The ore vein runs deep into the rock. Working it will take a pickaxe and a strong back.

mine-check.text: You set the pick against the stone and swing.
mine-check.success_text: The rock splits and a good haul comes loose.
mine-check.failure_text: The pick skips off the hard stone. You catch your breath and try again.

leave.text: You shoulder your pack and leave the seam behind.
